anti_claims: this manifest does not claim Erdos #257 is solved
this manifest does not promote pilot evidence into universal proof
this manifest does not call providers or update upstream registries
cells are addressable evidence rows, not standalone publication-grade citations

cells.candidate_obligation_node_ref_reason: bounded pilot Lean certificate kernel relates to the kernel-package and period-noncollapse routes; explicit authority for an exact node match is reserved for a domain-aware author
cells.claim: The Lean selector interface / certificate kernel was checked with no `sorry` on the bounded pilot corpus.

next_decisive_experiment.next_step: Lean-check the order-drop-to-ModEq supplier, then compose the one-direction collapse-divisor theorem before selector/existence work.

cells.candidate_obligation_node_ref_reason: bounded canonical-witness selector receipt is evidence of stable witness-hit reduction; explicit DAG-node match is reserved for a domain-aware author
cells.claim: On the bounded pilot grid, the canonical witness selector reduced every searched prime-component row to a singleton-minimal witness (selector kernel status PASS).
non_claims: not a Lean proof of universal selector existence
bounded grid does not generalize without an existence theorem

cells.candidate_obligation_node_ref_reason: collapse-divisor criterion is the bounded local-check for the LCM-exactness / period-noncollapse conjecture; explicit DAG-node match is reserved for a domain-aware author
cells.claim: The collapse-divisor criterion check passed across the bounded pilot case set with zero collapse-divisor collapses.
non_claims: not a Lean proof of the universal collapse-divisor lemma

cells.candidate_obligation_node_ref_reason: boundary cell: a private capability inventory is not a node in the public obligation DAG; no link should be drawn
cells.claim: A research-operations capability map exists for the formal-math pilot lane, with explicit capability and external-source counts.

cells.candidate_obligation_node_ref_reason: boundary cell: a leakage audit is a safety control over the lane, not a node in the public obligation DAG; no link should be drawn
cells.claim: During the period-noncollapse strike, no provider proof calls were made for Erdos257 and no upstream registry/repo action was taken; the strike Lean microkernel reported zero banned-token hits.

cells.candidate_obligation_node_ref_reason: forward Lean target catalog spans the kernel-package, density-package, and shell-to-kernel route obligations; explicit per-target DAG-node mapping is reserved for a domain-aware author
cells.claim: The strike state declares a catalog of Lean formalization targets plus per-target boundaries and dependencies; this is a forward-direction obligation list, not proof of any target.
non_claims: not proof of any listed target
not Lean-checked closure of the named lemmas
